title: Adobe India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Adobe India Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Adobe India Holdings Services in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
